args.code: (()=>{const g=window.gameState;const p=window.playerStats;if(!g||!p)return {error:'gameState or playerStats missing'};const npc=(window.npcSystem||window.npcData||{});const npcList=(window.npcSystem&&window.npcSystem.npcs?window.npcSystem.npcs:window.npcData||{});const eventCount=(window.eventSystem&&window.eventSystem.history?window.eventSystem.history.length:(window.eventHistory||[]).length||0);const skillTotal=(window.skillSystem&&window.skillSystem.skills?Object.values(window.skillSystem.skills).reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.level||0),0):0);const fields=(window.farmFields||window.fields||[]);const npcHearts=[];for(const k in npcList){const v=npcList[k];if(v&&v.friendship!==undefined){npcHearts.push(k+':'+v.friendship);}else if(v&&v.heartCount!==undefined){npcHearts.push(k+':'+v.heartCount);}}return {day:g.day||0,season:g.season||'未知',money:g.money||0,energy:p.energy||0,maxEnergy:p.maxEnergy||0,health:p.health||0,maxHealth:p.maxHealth||0,fieldCount:fields.length,fieldStates:fields.map(f=>f.status||f.state||'unknown'),crop:fields.map(f=>f.cropName||f.crop||'无').join(','),events:eventCount,skillTotal:skillTotal,skills:window.skillSystem&&window.skillSystem.skills?Object.entries(window.skillSystem.skills).map(([k,v])=>k+':'+(v.level||0)):[],npcHearts:npcHearts.slice(0,10),mood:p.mood||0,reputation:g.reputation||0,difficulty:g.difficulty||p.difficulty||'未知',gameSpeed:window.gameSpeed||1,disasterRate:window.disasterRate||1,storage:(window.storageSystem||window.warehouse||{}),research:g.researchPoints||0,achievements:(window.achievementSystem&&window.achievementSystem.unlocked?window.achievementSystem.unlocked:[]).length,totalHarvest:g.totalHarvest||0,totalSales:g.totalSales||0,daysPlayed:g.daysPlayed||g.day||0,saveVersion:window.saveVersion||'未知',npcCount:Object.keys(npcList).length,weather:g.weather||'未知',house:g.house||'未知'};})()
